name: Palladium FC
nameThai: สนามฟุตบอลหญ้าเทียมพัทยา สนามฟุตซอล Palladium FC
addressFull: 167/10 Moo 10, Soi Ko Phai 10, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Current sources conflict: the operator Facebook page says always open, while Google Maps showed a 03:00 closing time at verification. Confirm a late-night booking with the manager.
publicAccess: Commercial pitch hire is advertised, and the manager currently directs individual players into regular games by phone or on-site enquiry.

booking.method: Call the manager or message the official Facebook page

pickupGames.schedule: The manager said games run daily at 17:00; a recent player separately documented a Saturday 16:00 gathering with many foreign players.
pickupGames.howToJoin: Call the manager at +66 83 923 1595 or ask the manager on site; the venue also points newcomers to Jomtien United.

leagues.details: The operator documents regular team play and identifies Jomtien United as a team playing at the ground almost every day; formal league structure is not published.

englishEvidence: In current Google reviews, the manager answers English-language requests from foreign visitors with a specific daily time and direct phone invitation. The official page also publishes bilingual Thai/English posts.

praise: Recent English-language players describe a welcoming foreign-player group on Saturdays and a manager who actively connects newcomers with near-daily team games.
Recent Thai and English operator activity presents the ground as a long-running social football venue, and player reviews praise the people and atmosphere.
complaints: The newest visible review set contained a three-star rating without text but no repeated, substantiated facility complaint.

sources.label: Official Facebook identity, current activity, phone, hours and bilingual communication
